Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel A Second Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff, Rickey A. Johnigan
Off Calendar Apr-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STACI SOUZA, ADOBE PICTURES, INC.'S Motion To Compel A Second Independent Medical Examination Of Plaintiff, Rickey A. Johnigan.

Defendants' motion to compel a second independent medical examination of plaintiff is granted and the court adopts the Judge Pro Tem's report and recommendation.

Prevailing party to prepare order which attaches the Judge Pro Tem's report and in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
